hardware_context.gpu: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2070 Super (mobile, 8 GB VRAM)

benchmarks.name: TinyStories BPE sustained training
benchmarks.configuration: Mixed precision, Batch=8 (effective 16 with grad accum), Seq=128, 2-layer Mamba LM (182K params), 30 steps
benchmarks.notes: Real training with autotuner; profile caps MaxMicroBatch=8. Step 1 shows lower throughput (~2600 tok/s) due to GPU warmup.

benchmarks.name: TinyStories BPE peak micro-benchmark
benchmarks.configuration: Mixed precision, Batch=320 (FixedBatchOverride), Seq=128, 2-layer Mamba LM (185K params), 4 steps
benchmarks.notes: Profile limits bypassed via FixedBatchOverride; maximum achievable throughput in micro-benchmark, not representative of sustained training

benchmarks.name: TinyStories BPE INT8 training
benchmarks.configuration: INT8, Batch=320 (FixedBatchOverride), Seq=128, 2-layer Mamba LM (185K params), 4 steps
benchmarks.notes: INT8 weights on Mamba projections; LM head stays FP32. Throughput near-identical to FP32 at this model scale.

limitations: All results from single laptop environment with mobile GPU
No multi-GPU or cluster testing performed
Small model sizes limit Tensor Core utilization
Peak micro-benchmarks (Batch=320) not representative of sustained training throughput
Sustained training throughput ~7,000-8,500 tok/s with profile-default batch sizes
